parameters.query: INSERT INTO adoff_autopilot.media_queue (brand, platform, format_type, topic, copy_text, slides, duration_sec, requested_by) VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5,$6,$7,$8) RETURNING job_id, status, created_at;

SELECT job_id, brand, platform, format_type, status, output_path, file_size, width, height, gen_seconds, error, created_at, completed_at FROM adoff_autopilot.media_queue WHERE job_id = $1::uuid LIMIT 1;
